title.zh: Apache Log4j2 RCE JDK 版本限制实验：绕过与防护
title.en: Apache Log4j2 RCE JDK Version Limit Experiment: Bypass and Protection

description.zh: 详细测试 Log4j2 远程代码执行漏洞在不同 JDK 版本下的表现，分析 RMI/LDAP 协议在不同 JDK 版本中的限制以及 setProperty 属性的影响。
description.en: Detailed testing of Log4j2 remote code execution vulnerability behavior under different JDK versions, analyzing RMI/LDAP protocol restrictions in different JDK versions and the impact of setProperty attributes.

content.zh: JDK 版本对 Log4j2 漏洞有什么影响？
content.en: What impact does JDK version have on Log4j2 vulnerability?

annotation.zh: 用户询问 JDK 版本限制
annotation.en: User asks about JDK version restrictions

content.zh: JDK 版本限制演进：JDK 6u45/7u21 后 java.rmi.server.useCodebaseOnly 默认为 true，禁用远程类文件加载；JDK 6u141/7u131/8u121 后增加 com.sun.jndi.rmi.object.trustURLCodebase 默认 false，禁止 RMI/CORBA 远程 codebase；JDK 6u211/7u201/8u191 后增加 com.sun.jndi.ldap.object.trustURLCodebase 默认 false，禁止 LDAP 远程 codebase。
content.en: JDK version restriction evolution: After JDK 6u45/7u21, java.rmi.server.useCodebaseOnly defaults to true, disabling remote class file loading; After JDK 6u141/7u131/8u121, added com.sun.jndi.rmi.object.trustURLCodebase defaults to false, prohibiting RMI/CORBA remote codebase; After JDK 6u211/7u201/8u191, added com.sun.jndi.ldap.object.trustURLCodebase defaults to false, prohibiting LDAP remote codebase.

content.zh: setProperty 属性如何影响漏洞利用？
content.en: How does setProperty attribute affect vulnerability exploitation?

content.zh: setProperty 影响分析：JDK 8u181(<8u191) 时，开启 RMI/LDAP setProperty 都可 RCE；JDK 8u332(>8u191) 时，只有开启 setProperty 的 RMI 可 RCE，LDAP 即使开启 setProperty 也无法利用。测试表格显示：低版本 JDK + setProperty 开启 = RCE 成功率高。
content.en: setProperty impact analysis: With JDK 8u181(<8u191), RMI/LDAP setProperty enabled both can achieve RCE; With JDK 8u332(>8u191), only RMI with setProperty enabled can achieve RCE, LDAP cannot be exploited even with setProperty enabled. Test table shows: Lower JDK version + setProperty enabled = Higher RCE success rate.

content.zh: RMI 和 LDAP 协议有什么区别？
content.en: What's the difference between RMI and LDAP protocols?

content.zh: 协议对比：RMI 使用 jndi:rmi:// 协议，LDAP 使用 jndi:ldap:// 协议。JDK 版本越高，RMI 和 LDAP 的利用限制越多。在高版本 JDK 中，RMI 需要开启 setProperty 才能利用，而 LDAP 完全被禁止。防护建议：升级 JDK 到最新版本，避免使用不安全的 JNDI 查询。
content.en: Protocol comparison: RMI uses jndi:rmi:// protocol, LDAP uses jndi:ldap:// protocol. Higher JDK versions have more restrictions on RMI and LDAP exploitation. In high version JDK, RMI requires setProperty enabled for exploitation, while LDAP is completely prohibited. Protection recommendation: Upgrade JDK to latest version, avoid using insecure JNDI lookups.
